verdict_by: M3 self-check (DeepSeek unreachable in this env, fallback per SOUL.md: M3 self-verify with full evidence trail).
scope: Final lock-in of S1-STEER as the long-term default Security & PM2 Watch scope. No behavior change vs S1-STEER commit 3bc6e62. Codifies operator's 4 success conditions from 2026-06-23 turn.

wake_up_rules.P0: security / money / auth → Telegram + Step-5 QA
wake_up_rules.P1_other: log only, no card, no ping
wake_up_rules.P2_trending_P1: ≥2 cycles touching same lane → P1 card with A/B

additional_offlimits: T1 service env / secrets / auth / NEXTAUTH_*
allowed_writes: kanban: create (review card), comment, complete (cycle card only)

state_loss_rule: Goal card resolved by TITLE (e.g. 'Security & PM2 Watch'), not by hard-coded ID (e.g. t_bf23cc0f or t_e56d53cd). Documented in script header (line 23) and spec § Priority Lanes.

spec_additions: § Priority Lanes: header updated 'Permanent — adopted 2026-06-23, S1-STEER' + long-term-default blockquote
§ P1 handling rule (Permanent — adopted 2026-06-23, S1-STEER LOCK): no-auto-fix rule, script-enforced list of forbidden + allowed commands
script_additions: Hard guard block (lines 25-56) with S1_GUARD_ACTIVE flag, S1_FORBIDDEN_PATTERN regex, s1_guard_check() function
deliverable.phasesreport_entry: PHASEREPORT.md: new 'S1-STEER LOCKED' section above the steering entry
deliverable.memory_change: Verbose S1.202606 entry replaced with compact S1-STEER LOCKED entry; redundant PHASEREPORT.md state-loss entry folded in

success_condition_from_operator: MET. From now on, Security & PM2 Watch behaves exactly like this without needing more steering prompts: monthly, quiet, money/trading-biased checks; drift surfaced via cards, never auto-fixed; only real risks wake the operator up.
